Package org.apache.juneau.microservice.management

Class BasicActuatorGroup

java.lang.Object
jakarta.servlet.GenericServlet
jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServlet
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet.RestServlet
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet.BasicRestServlet
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet.BasicRestServletGroup
org.apache.juneau.microservice.management.BasicActuatorGroup
All Implemented Interfaces:
jakarta.servlet.Servlet, jakarta.servlet.ServletConfig, Serializable, BasicUniversalConfig, DefaultConfig, DefaultHtmlConfig
public class BasicActuatorGroup extends BasicRestServletGroup
Convenience assembly of the Actuator-style management surface under a single configurable path prefix.

Mounts the management endpoints by composing their *Mixin flavors via @Rest(mixins=...) on top of BasicRestServletGroup:

  • /info — InfoMixin (manifest/build/version/git metadata)
  • /loggers, /loggers/{name} — LoggersMixin (runtime JUL level get/set)
  • /healthz, /readyz, /livez — HealthMixin (read-through health view)
  • /threaddump, /heapdump — DumpsMixin (deny-by-default diagnostics)

Path prefix: defaults to /actuator and is configurable via the juneau.actuator.path system property (resolved through the standard $S{...} SVL var). Mount the group at a custom prefix either by setting that property or by subclassing with your own @Rest(path=...).

Composition is convenience, not the only way in: every endpoint remains independently mountable a-la-carte via its standalone *Mixin/*Resource flavor. The /metrics endpoint is not assembled here — it lives in the juneau-rest-server-metrics-micrometer module (which this module does not depend on), so add MetricsMixin a-la-carte when that module is present.

Exposure policy: the read endpoints (/info, /loggers read, health) are on; the mutating/sensitive ones (/loggers write, /threaddump, /heapdump) are deny-by-default — the dumps via DumpsSettings, and logger-writes should be guarded by the consumer. No auth provider is auto-wired (explicit-over-magic).

See Also:
  • Management Surface
Since:
10.0.0
